balance.no_wallet: [BALANCE] Error: You never setup your wallet.

history.fetching: [HISTORY] We dey find your transaction history for {{phone}}...
history.more: Reply HISTORY MORE to see older transactions
history.not_funded: No transaction history — your wallet never collect money yet
history.unavailable: Transaction history no dey available right now. Abeg try again later.
history.no_wallet: Error: You never setup your wallet.

send.usage: How to use: SEND <amount> <@username or phone>
send.no_wallet: Error: You never setup your wallet.
send.no_recipient: Error: We no see wallet for {{target}}.
send.initiating: [SEND] We dey try send {{amount}} XLM go {{target}}...
send.success: ✅ You don successfully send {{amount}} XLM go {{target}}!

request.usage: How to use: REQUEST <amount> <@username or phone>
request.notify_recipient: 🔔 [REQUEST] {{sender}} dey ask you for {{amount}} XLM. Reply with: SEND {{amount}} {{senderPhone}}
request.confirmation: [REQUEST] We don send request for {{amount}} XLM go {{target}}.

invite_member.usage: How to use: INVITE MEMBER <@username or phone>
invite_member.not_creator: Error: You never create any group.
invite_member.notify_recipient:
🔔 [INVITE] {{sender}} don invite you make you join their ajo "{{groupName}}".

Reply with: JOIN GROUP {{groupId}}

contribute.no_group: Error: You no dey any group.
contribute.amount_mismatch: ❌ Contribution must be exactly {{required}} XLM as the group require.
contribute.initiating: [CONTRIBUTE] We dey try contribute {{amount}} XLM go "{{groupName}}"...
contribute.success: ✅ You don successfully contribute {{amount}} XLM go "{{groupName}}"!

validation.invalid_format: ❌ Invalid amount format. Abeg enter positive number (e.g., 10 or 10.50).
validation.zero_amount: ❌ Amount must be greater than zero.
validation.precision_exceeded: ❌ Amount no fit pass 7 decimal places.
validation.exceeds_max: ❌ Amount don pass the maximum wey we allow (1,000,000 XLM).

withdraw.no_group: Error: You no dey any group.
withdraw.success: ✅ You don successfully withdraw {{amount}} XLM from "{{groupName}}"! (MOCKED)

help.text:
*Kolo Commands:*

_Account_
BALANCE
BALANCE <asset>
HISTORY
PROFILE

_Payments_
SEND <amount> <@user>
REQUEST <amount> <@user>

_Savings Groups_
CREATE GROUP <name> <amount> <frequency>
JOIN GROUP <groupId>
INVITE MEMBER <@user>
GROUP STATUS
CONTRIBUTE <amount>
WITHDRAW <amount>

_Support_
HELP
SUPPORT

unknown.command: I no understand that command. Send HELP to see commands wey dey work.

language.current: Your current language na: {{current}}. Reply with LANGUAGE <yoruba/pidgin/french/hausa/igbo/english> to change am.
language.unsupported: We no support this language. Abeg choose from: yoruba, pidgin, french, hausa, igbo, english.

wallet.usdc_trustline_low_reserve: You need at least 2 XLM for your wallet make you fit use USDC.
